name: Liquid Air
description: You gain the ability to swim through the air as if it was water for 15 minutes.

name: Candle
description: Your frontmost and centermost horn produces a small flame which can illuminate your surroundings dimly.

name: Banana Acolytes
description: Roll a D6 and spawn in that number of 18 inch tall banana constructs who all believe themselves to be the Banana King.

name: En Español
description: Everyone within 100 feet of you can now only speak in Spanish. Does NOT grant the ability to understand Spanish.

name: Chaos Entities
description: Summon two insane unicorns who will try to steal all your stuff. One pink and one blue.

name: Folding Chair
description: There used to not be a folding chair here, but now there is. Never exactly the same chair.

name: Hypeman
description: A shrimp wearing sunglasses appears, and gives you a boost of confidence. Gain +5 to all influence rolls for the next day.

name: Glitter Burst
description: A, let me be clear, EXPLOSION of glitter erupts from you, sticking to anything it touches. Useful for revealing invisible objects, otherwise a huge mess to clean up.

name: Ethereal Glow
description: Your entire body starts to glow an eerie blue color and goes partially transparent, as if you were a ghost.

name: Be Unseen
description: You turn invisible

name: Teleport
description: You gain the ability to teleport at will to a position you can see for 5 minutes.

name: Dino Directions
description: Summons a gigantic magical Liopleurodon that can give you vital information... if you can understand it.

name: Vortex
description: A vortex to another dimension opens on your back, you and anyone within 50 ft of you makes a DC 10 Stability check or is sucked into the vortex. Inside the vortex, roll a D20, the following happens: 1, an Eldritch Horror tries to kill anyone in the vortex and escape to the real world. 2-4, The two chaos entities find you in the vortex and come back to the standard reality with you. 5-18, Mystery. 19 or 20, you find the magical amulet, and return to reality.

name: Prophesy
description: You have a sudden vision which gives you insight into the future, during which you float a few feet off the ground and your eyes glow white.

name: Prehensile Tongue
description: For the next hour, your tongue is 10 feet long, and you have full control of it to grab and manipulate things.

name: Water Breathing
description: For the next hour, you grow gills and can breathe underwater

name: Friends
description: Roll a D20, that many sea creatures are summoned, they perform a song and dance routine before promptly exploding. Gain +5 to any stability rolls for the rest of the day.

name: Kinetic Impulse
description: Whatever object you are looking at when this effect activates experiences a sudden acceleration to about 33,500 miles per hour, at a 45 degree angle from the ground. If the object is not instantly destroyed by the G’s and Atmosphere, it will reach a stable orbit around the planet and never return to the surface.

name: Taser
description: 1,000,000 Volts arc between your horns, you can use your head as a taser. Your opponent makes a DC 10 stability check or falls unconscious. If they fail, they roll a D20, and on a 1 their heart stops.

name: Rainbow Ride
description: A magical rainbow manifests underneath you and propels you forward at 60 mph constantly for 2 minutes.

name: Corpse Puppet
description: Re-animates the nearest dead animal to do your bidding for 24 hours. If no corpse is available, creates a construct of decaying material in the shape of an animal you choose to do the same thing.

name: Snail Mode
description: You grow a shell on your horseback, and your legs disappear into your body, you are now a Snail Centaur for 1 hour.

name: Magic Mucus
description: Mucus shoots out from you in every direction, coating anything exposed to you with an extremely sticky substance. Any ground immediately becomes extremely difficult to traverse, and anyone caught in the blast will stick to anything they touch.

name: Feet
description: You have human feet for 1 hour. Mens size 14 US

name: Plainify
description: Whatever you are focusing on when this effect activates becomes the most boring version of itself. Any seasoning is sucked out of food, any color is sucked out of an object. Any person loses all personality and just becomes their most prominent trope for 1 hour.

name: Frost Blast
description: A white ball of energy shoots out from in front of you, it explodes on contact with anything and freezes solid anything within 15 feet of the impact point.

name: Acid Spray
description: A cone of acid shoots out of one of your horns in the direction you are facing, melting almost anything it touches within seconds.

name: Shatter
description: Whatever you are looking at explodes.

name: Heal Wound
description: For 5 minutes you gain Prehensile tongue (#15) and you can heal any wound you can wrap your tongue around.

name: 1000 Years of Darkness
description: For 10 minutes, any creature you focus on in range immediately experiences extreme darkness and time dilation of a ratio 52,560,000 : 1, meaning for every second of realtime for an outside observer, the creature experiences 1 year and 8 months of darkness. Focusing on a creature for the entire 10 minutes would result in them experiencing 1000 years of darkness.

name: Choo Choo Shoe
description: Summons a gigantic shoe, approximately 4 feet tall and 6 feet long. If you get inside the shoe, it makes a very faint train sound. It makes decent cover.

name: Water jet
description: Your mouth erupts with 10 gallons of water per second for 10 second

name: Laser eyes
description: You can shoot lasers from your eyes for 10 minutes

name: Millipede’s Fathomless Grace
description: You sprout 10 additional horse legs along your sides. They tiptoe forward in a mesmerizing wave-like motion, carrying you with impossible elegance. For the next 10 minutes, you can walk on any solid surface regardless of its angle, including walls and ceilings.

name: Millipede’s Glamor to Spare
description: You sprout 10 additional horse legs along your sides. Each leg has a tiny, dainty sparkling high heel. Your glamor is impossible to ignore, gain +5 to all influence checks, and -5 to any stealth rolls.

name: Millipede’s 300 Eggs
description: You involuntarily launch 300 perfectly ordinary chicken eggs from your hindquarters over the course of 3 seconds. The eggs are expelled with startling velocity, ricocheting off walls, furniture, and unsuspecting bystanders before coming to rest. Miraculously, none of the eggs crack during the process. They are fresh, edible, and entirely mundane.

name: Candy Cave Psychosis
description: Every dangerous thing suddenly seems whimsical and inviting. Bottomless pits look shallow. Lava looks pleasantly warm. Monsters look lonely. Explosives seem decorative.

name: Summon Bridge
description: You summon a bridge in the direction you are looking. Roll a D20 to determine the size, A 1 is a plank over a creek, a nat 20 is a trans-oceanic highway bridge. I’ll determine what the consequences of this are when we get to it.

name: Rebound
description: The next consequence intended for you instead affects whoever caused it.

name: Spirit Wrestler
description: You summon a spiritual guardian in the form of a human wrestler, this wrestler has a D20 in conflict, force and reflex, and a D4 in everything else. It will fight anyone that you want for one minute and then disappear.

name: Theme Song
description: Your theme song from your old wrestling days seems to play from nowhere. Anyone you consider an opponent who hears it makes a DC 10 stability check or runs away in fear. You gain +5 to all influence rolls and +5 to intimidation rolls for 1 hour.

name: Jelly Legs
description: The next creature you look at loses all of the bones in their legs for one hour. After which the bones return and the legs return back to normal. This is not painful, just very inconvenient.

name: Summon Potato Salad
description: Roll a D10. Raise 2 to that power. You summon that many pounds of potato salad. Roll a D4: 1: Loose potato salad everywhere 2: A pile of potato salad on the ground 3: Potato Salad in a bowl large enough to hold all of it. 4: Potato salad packed into tupperware of your choice.

name: Ask Nyx
description: You summon the ghost of an anthropomorphic pangolin researcher named Nyx. Nyx will answer one question for you with insight from beyond the grave.

name: Summon Talking Coat
description: You summon what looks like a really nice leather Jacket, but it has a face on the back, and is sentient.

name: Banana Ear Psychosis
description: You gain the ability to hear things that do not make sounds. However, your brain insists on interpreting them as banana-related noises. For example, a locked door "sounds like a disappointed banana."

name: Prank Call Psychosis
description: You receive a magical prank call only you can hear. The caller claims everyone around you is secretly laughing at you. The caller provides increasingly ridiculous "proof" that you are being mocked.

name: Sense of wellbeing
description: You feel GREAT, everything is AWESOME

name: Sense of Wellbutrin
description: You feel PRODUCTIVE. Everything MUST BE DONE.

name: Summon Perfect Souffle
description: Needs no further description. It is perfect. Where you want, how you want, when you want.

name: Snowman Psychosis
description: You believe yourself to be a snowman, you don’t have any legs, and you are slowly melting in the sun. takes a DC 12 Influence check from an ally to break you out of it.

name: Extract Kidney
description: A random nearby creature suddenly has one of their kidneys magically extracted and placed safely in your hand. They are completely unharmed and unaware that anything happened unless they somehow notice. The kidney immediately begins trying to return to its original owner. If it manages to get inside its original owner somehow, it somehow ends up back in its original position unharmed.

name: Create Diversion
description: You create the sound of an explosion 500 feet away in a random direction.

name: Musical Meltdown
description: You are compelled to sing a dramatic song. At the end of the performance, roll a DC 10 Stability check. On a failure, your emotions reach a magical crescendo and you explode. 10 minutes later you appear back in the group as if you had never left. On a success, you finish the song safely and look extremely cool.

name: Smoke Machine
description: You open your mouth and plumes of smoke erupt from you, rapidly filling the room with thick smoke which gives +5 to any stealth or surprise attack rolls

name: Tranquilizer Gun
description: For the next 10 minutes, you can shoot tranquilizer darts out of your mouth at will. Anyone hit by one makes a DC 12 Stability check or falls unconscious.

name: Ancient Mushroom Wisdom
description: You commune with the trees around you. They can tell you about anything that happened within visual range of them since they began growing.

name: Magic Mushroom
description: Anyone within 30 feet of you experiences strong visual hallucinations for the next hour. They roll a D20 1-5: they are lost in another dimension for what feels like 1000 years. 6-10: They cannot reliably tell the difference between their hallucinations and reality. Hallucinations are vivid and of people and speech. 11-15: Their hallucinations are producing images of things that aren’t there, but their brain understands what is real and what isn’t. 16-19: Shapes and pretty colors, they’re fine. Nat 20: You meet God.

name: Yummy Mushroom
description: Everyone within 30 feet of you suddenly tastes a delicious earthy savory flavor. Nice.

name: Starfish’s Love
description: You are suddenly overwhelmed with the undeniable knowledge that you are loved. For the next hour, you cannot be affected by fear, loneliness, or feelings of worthlessness. Somewhere nearby, a random person, animal, or object begins aggressively trying to show you affection.

name: Sand Blast
description: A portal opens in front of you at chest height, and a truly massive amount of sand rockets out of it. I’ll decide how we deal with this mechanically later.

name: Dehydration
description: For 1 hour you gain the ability to suck the water out of the cells of any organic material you can see. Where does the water go? Who knows.

name: Read Thoughts
description: You can suddenly hear the thoughts of anyone that you focus on.

name: Feel Feelings
description: You can suddenly feel the emotions of anyone that you focus on.

name: Slam
description: A spectral wrestler appears and will suplex 1 person you choose. The person cannot defend, there is no attack. The person is unconscious. Roll a D8, on an 8 the attack crits and the person breaks their neck and dies. The wrestler disappears after performing the suplex.

name: Flatulence
description: A magical fart occurs with the force and volume of a cannon blast. The sound, smell, and effects are completely disproportionate to the situation. The exact consequences are determined by the environment.

name: Cure Disease
description: You gain Prehensile tongue for 5 minutes, during which time you can wrap your tongue around one person and permanently cure a disease they have, after which, your tongue returns to normal even if the time limit has not elapsed.

name: Remove Curse
description: You gain Prehensile tongue for 5 minutes, during which time you can wrap your tongue around one person and permanently lift a curse they have, after which, your tongue returns to normal even if the time limit has not elapsed.

name: Insatiable Hunger
description: For 10 minutes you become INCREDIBLY hungry, no amount of food will satisfy you in this time, and you will eat ANYTHING.

name: Telekinesis
description: You gain basic telekinesis for one hour.

name: Hot Sauce
description: Roll a D20. Raise 2 to the power of the number you rolled. You summon that many ounces of hot sauce. Roll a D4, follows the same rules for packaging as Potato Salad.

name: Rapid Growth
description: Roll a D4, for every number you roll, you double in size. So a 1 you double, a 2 you quadruple, etc...

name: Flame Thrower
description: You open your mouth, and a jet of flame erupts out of it that is up to 20 feet long. Anything it touches immediately catches on fire.

name: Blow Torch
description: Allows you to use one of your fingers as a blowtorch capable of anything from creme brulee to cutting steel.

name: Summon Narwhal
description: A narwhal appears above you. It does not care if it isn’t in water, it continues to swim as if it was. It doesn’t care about anything.

name: Sense of Foreboding
description: Something BAD is about to happen. You need to LEAVE.

name: Sense of Formaterol
description: Your breathing becomes effortless. Your lungs feel like they have unlimited capacity, and every breath feels amazing. For the next hour, you can ignore any effects caused by smoke, exhaustion, poor air quality, or difficulty breathing. You are also extremely enthusiastic about how good breathing feels.

name: Undo
description: The last thing you did never happened.

name: Lifeline
description: Summon anyone from any reality.

name: Emergency Exit
description: A glowing door appears on the nearest wall, it leads somewhere safe.

name: Tiny Wizard
description: Summons a 6 inch tall wizard that loudly announces themselves, casts a single spell and disappears into a puff of smoke. The spell may or may not be helpful.

name: The Floor is Lava
description: For 10 minutes you can walk on any surface as if it were solid ground, walls and ceilings included. But you are terrified of and refuse to touch the actual ground.

name: Emergency Sandwich
description: A perfectly prepared sandwich appears in your hand. It has no further magical effects, but it is delicious.

name: The Button
description: A mysterious red button appears in your hand. You have no idea what it does, but you know it is important. When pressed, it disappears.

name: Llamas With Hats
description: Two llamas wearing hats appear. They have a short conversation that makes absolutely no sense to anyone nearby. At the end of the conversation, one llama looks at you and says, "This is your problem now." They both disappear.

name: Summon Horse
description: A horse appears nearby. It seems friendly.

name: The Floor Knows
description: A face appears on the floor beneath you. You can ask it one question and it will answer you honestly. It knows.

name: The Scenic Route
description: A path appears showing you the way to your next destination, but it frequently takes you out of your way to show you things it thinks are neat.

name: Weather Wizard
description: You can control the weather for 10 minutes.

name: Summon Gorbo
description: A shoe store appears in front of you with a sign that reads “Gorbo’s Wonderful Boot and Shoe Emporium” inside you find a goblin named Gorbo, as well as any style of shoe you wish at an incredibly reasonable price. The only catch, every shoe in the store has an enchantment simply called “Gorbo’s Enchantment” and Gorbo refuses to explain what it does, only “Shoe help.”

name: Rock
description: A rock appears in your hand. You could throw it at something I guess.

name: Wings
description: You grow a pair of wings from your horseback, they look amazing. Make a DC 20 stability check to fly, on a failure you are much too front heavy for the wings to actually work, you faceplant into the dirt.

name: The Extra Mile
description: Your legs become twice as long for 10 minutes. You are faster, but doorways are a bit of a problem now.

name: Helpful Shadow
description: Your shadow detaches from you, it can go and attempt to accomplish any task you give it.

name: Simulacrum
description: There are now two of you. Your clone seems to be in perfect alignment with your thoughts and goals, you get an efficiency upgrade. If used again while your previous clone still exists, the original clone will explode in a ball of fire.

name: Cosmic Receipt
description: A magical Receipt appears containing everything you own. At the bottom of the receipt is one additional item. You now own that item.

name: Unnecessary Goose
description: A goose appears wearing a wizard hat. It knows EXACTLY what is going on, but refuses to explain anything, after exactly 10 minutes, it disappears.

name: Reset
description: Reality attempts to undo the last 24 hours. Everyone retains dream-like memories of the other version of events.

name: Reality’s Apology
description: Reality briefly apologizes to you. It does not explain what it is apologizing for. For the next hour, reality will subtly try to make things easier for you.

name: Barrier Breach
description: You pierce the fabric of whatever separates the different realities that all of the characters are from. You gain insight into the mechanics of our shared reality. You are so used to reality breaking, that this doesn’t affect you psychically.
